description: A vehicle illustration component. Pure asset container — no tokens, no interactive states, no sub-components.

anatomy.description: Fixed-size wrapper. No background, no border, no shadow. Dimensions depend on context.
Static image asset rendered with object-cover. Asset name and aspect ratio depend on type and context.

variants.description: Standard car, diagonal view. Use in ride selection list rows.
Standard car, top-down view. Use as a map vehicle marker.
Van, diagonal view. Use in ride selection list rows.
Van, top-down view. Use as a map vehicle marker.

states.name: Static
states.description: Single rendering state. No hover, pressed, focus, or disabled states.

contextUsage.UI: In-app lists, ride selection rows, option cards. Paired with vehicle type name, capacity, ETA, and price.
contextUsage.Map: Live map overlays. Represents vehicle position and orientation.

accessibility.altTextWithLabel: Set alt="" (decorative) when a visible vehicle type label is present.
accessibility.altTextWithoutLabel: Set descriptive alt, e.g. "Standard car" or "Van".
accessibility.note: TODO: Confirm product-standard alt text convention for vehicle images.

notes: No design tokens. Pure image container.
Confirmed real-world usage: Type=default, Context=UI in ride option rows on Customer App home screen (node 3073:7464).
Customer App has a local variant (node 3094:10467) with a different/colourful image asset. Relationship to DS Core asset unclear.
TODO: Confirm whether additional vehicle types beyond 'default' and 'van' are planned.
TODO: Confirm production image format (SVG, PNG, WebP).
TODO: Confirm alt text convention for map context.
